audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: the embedded trusted setup is loaded once at blockchain service initialization (service.go:171 calls kzg.Start()) and all verification operations use this globally loaded setup through the c-kzg-4844 library. The library uses a global state pattern where LoadTrustedSetup() (trusted_setup.go:67) loads the precomputed setup into c-kzg's global state, and all subsequent VerifyCellKZGProofBatch calls (kzg.go:105) use this setup without recomputation. No code path recomputes or bypasses the precomputed setup values.
